Meaning.En: Not operating to generate profit; typically referring to organizations whose primary purpose is to serve a public or mutual benefit rather than to earn profit for owners or investors.
Meaning.Example: The nonprofit donated all proceeds to charity.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả tổ chức hoạt động vì lợi ích cộng đồng, không chia cổ tức hay lợi nhuận cho người điều hành.
Situation.En: Describing an organization that reinvests all surplus funds into its mission instead of distributing them as profit.

Meaning.En: An organization that does not distribute its surplus funds to owners or shareholders, but instead reinvests them into its mission.
Meaning.Example: She works for a local nonprofit that provides food to the homeless.

Situation.Vi: Cảnh tượng một cá nhân hoặc nhóm làm việc trong tổ chức như quỹ từ thiện, hội cứu trợ, hoặc trung tâm hỗ trợ cộng đồng.
Situation.En: A scenario involving someone volunteering or employed by an organization such as a charity, relief agency, or community support center.
